violations.text: The door to the outside, located at the main entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Technician was on-site and informed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026
Cases of single service items were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen and service areas. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2026

A low-boy in the service area was observed in poor repair, with an ambient temperature of 64 degrees. PIC stated warranty claim has been made; awaiting technician and/or replacement. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026
The area surrounding the shared dumpsters has an accumulation of trash debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026
